description: Current research with attention to the evolutionary biology of humans and fossil human relatives.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ANTHRO 105,ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY/​BOTANY  152,ZOOLOGY/​BIOLOGY  101,F&W ECOL/​ENVIR ST/​ZOOLOGY  360,BIOCORE 382,ZOOLOGY/​BOTANY/​ENVIR ST  260,ZOOLOGY/​ANTHRO/​BOTANY  410, or graduate/professional standing
